package rulecoverage

func NegativeCobraFlagLookupInRun() string {
    ruleID := "cobra_flag_lookup_in_run"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`cmd.Flags().GetString(\"flag\")` inside `RunE` when the flag could be bound to a variable with `StringVar`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
